guide.step1Content1: Please visit the TRTC console and create an RTC Engine application.
guide.step2Content: Copy the SDKAppId and SDKSecretKey into the input box
guide.step3Item2: Click the "Enter Room" button to enter the room
guide.step3Item3: Click the "Start Local Audio/Video" button to capture microphone or camera
guide.step3Item4: Click the "Stop Local Audio/Video" button to stop capturing microphone or camera
guide.step3Item5: Click the "Start Share Screen" button to start screen sharing
guide.step3Item6: Click the "Stop Share Screen" button to stop screen sharing

device.title: Device
device.permissionTip: PS: Please make sure the current page allows camera and microphone permissions before joining the room.

invite.tip: Copy the link to invite friends to join the video call, one link can invite only one person, the link will be updated automatically after copying.
invite.pageTitle: You are invited to this video chat room!

security.warning: Notes: this Demo is only applicable for debugging. Before official launch, please migrate the UserSig calculation code and key to your backend server to avoid unauthorized traffic use caused by the leakage of encryption key.
